comment: Thresholds pre-committed from VE-001-revenue-routing-commitment.md BEFORE the run. Fill 'observed' after field work, then: python3 opportunity-intelligence/tools/run.py verdict knowledge-base/validation/VE-001-result.json

metrics.name: waitlist_completion_pct
metrics.description: % of qualified merchants offered the waitlist who complete it including the >=30% routing condition

metrics.name: costly_workaround_interviews
metrics.description: of 15 interviews: merchants describing a costly current workaround unprompted

metrics.name: no_costly_workaround_interviews
metrics.description: of 15 interviews: merchants showing no costly workaround (kill signal)

on_pass: OPP-001 stays Promising; start 7-week concierge MVP (conditionally pre-approved in recommendation 2026-07-10); re-score scorecard with interview evidence
on_fail: Reclassify OPP-001 as Weak in BACKLOG.md; run stress-test review before any archive decision
on_inconclusive: Redesign incentive or segment and re-run; do not extend the same design silently
